shipping.summary: - USE Code 'Last10' for EXTRA OFF Gifts Responsibly Produced Goods All Sustainable items Recycled Materials Durable Construction Organic Cotton Hemp Fairtrade Approved Blue Sign Approved Vegan Friendly Renewable Energy Reduced Water Use Traceable Down Made In The UK Made in Japan Made in the USA Made with Gore-Tex Gift Vouchers The Journal About Urban Industry Contact & Help Live Chat FAQs Privacy Policy Terms & Conditions UK Shipping International Shipping Returns AED AUD CAD CHF CZK DKK EUR GBP HKD HUF ILS JPY KRW NOK NZD PHP PLN SEK SGD TWD USD Choosing a selection results in a full page refresh.

tax.summary: (DDP) Urban Industry now take care of all of your own countries TAX, Duties and Admin Fees so you can just order and take delivery!

fee.summary: The customer takes full liability for all postal charges, return shipment costs, customs charges and handling fees should they refuse to accept a parcel due to import duties or taxes.

result.overall_note: Local rule-based extraction from official policy pages.
